label: G006 · Why AI Is Just a Cog — flow 1
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (8 nodes).

label: G006 · Self-Service Appointment Booking with Confirmation — flow 10
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (13 nodes).

nodes.title: Store appointment details: time, timezone, duration
Send confirmation SMS with calendar invite

label: G006 · Multi-Channel Reminders with Confirmation — flow 11
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (13 nodes).

nodes.title: After appointment time, check if completed

label: G006 · No-Show Detection and Auto-Reschedule — flow 12
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (18 nodes).

nodes.title: Send immediate SMS: “We missed you – click to reschedule”
Generate unique reschedule link same rep, available slots
Create task for rep: “Follow up with no‑show lead”
Add tag `no_show` and move stage to `REACTIVATION`
Send confirmation of new time, cancel old task
Escalate: second SMS, reassign task to manager
After 7 days with no reschedule, mark as lost lead

label: G006 · Document Generation from Template + Dynamic Data — flow 13
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (13 nodes).

nodes.title: Fetch lead data: name, service, amount, options
Load template from document store DOCX/PDF/HTML
Data validation: all required fields present?
Create task for rep: missing information
Save document to cloud storage Google Drive, AWS S3
Generate unique access link signed URL, short expiry
Log document generation event to Airtable

label: G006 · Open/Click Tracking with Webhooks — flow 14
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (12 nodes).

nodes.title: Estimate document sent with tracking pixel and links
Embed invisible pixel and unique click URLs
Recipient opens email or clicks link
Tracking pixel fires OR link redirects via tracking server
Webhook sends event to orchestration layer
Determine link type: accept, financing, question
Trigger specific action: e.g., send financing breakdown
If open_count > 3 with no action, flag for rep review
If engagement signal high, optionally send follow‑up

label: G006 · Timer-Based Follow-Up Sequence — flow 15
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (15 nodes).

nodes.title: If no response after 7 days, move to REACTIVATION
Lead action detected? accept or reject or objection
Pause follow‑up sequence, route to objection handling

label: G006 · Objection Detection and Auto-Response — flow 16
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (18 nodes).

nodes.title: confusion → send one‑page summary, offer call
Log response and increment attempt counter
Create task: call lead, review objection

label: G006 · Multi-Stage Approval Workflow — flow 17
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (16 nodes).

nodes.title: Determine approval chain based on amount, type
Create approval record with step list
Step 1: Notify approver A via Slack, email

label: G006 · E-Signature Collection with Audit Trail — flow 18
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (18 nodes).

nodes.title: Create signature envelope via DocuSign or PandaDoc
Send signature request to customer email and SMS
Store envelope ID in CRM, start monitoring
Download signed PDF, store in cloud
Update CRM: contract_signed = true, signed_at timestamp
Attach signed PDF link to contact record
Create task: call customer about signature

label: G006 · Payment Processing with Idempotent Webhooks — flow 19
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (19 nodes).

nodes.title: Redirect to payment gateway Stripe, Square, Authorize.net
Webhook endpoint receives event with idempotency key
Check if event already processed? lookup key in data store
Parse event type payment succeeded, failed, refunded
Update CRM: payment_status = paid, amount, timestamp
Increment retry count, send failure notification
Update CRM: payment_status = refunded, log reason
If this is final payment, change stage to FULFILL
If progress payment, update milestone, schedule next payment
Retry after delay 1 day, 3 days, 7 days
Create task for collections team, move stage to PAYMENT_FAILED
Notify customer of refund, update accounting

label: G006 · Failure Families & Observability — flow 2
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (11 nodes).

label: G006 · Dunning Management for Recurring Payments — flow 20
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (18 nodes).

nodes.title: Capture failure reason decline, expired card, insufficient funds
Notify customer via SMS/email: payment failed
Schedule retry with exponential backoff day 1, day 3, day 7
Customer updates payment method via link
Mark subscription as active, clear failure flags
If still failing after max retries, escalate
Send final notice: account will be suspended

label: G006 · Financing Application and Approval Workflow — flow 21
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (16 nodes).

nodes.title: Price objection detected or customer requests financing
Send financing offer SMS/email with application link
Customer clicks link, fills lender application pre-filled with estimate amount
Update CRM: financing_status = approved, approved_amount, terms
Create task for rep: request additional docs from customer
Send approval SMS: Your financing is approved! Accept estimate here link
Reset decision timer, move to DECISION_PENDING or CLOSED_WON if auto-accept
Notify rep via Slack: Lead approved for financing
Send denial SMS with in‑house payment plan offer
Create task for rep: offer in‑house plan
Move back to OBJECTION_HANDLING with price objection

label: G006 · Purchase Order Generation and Vendor Routing — flow 22
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (15 nodes).

nodes.title: Determine vendor for each item based on price, availability
Send PO to vendor via email or vendor portal
Store PO copy in cloud storage, link to CRM
Escalate to purchasing manager, create task

label: G006 · Shipment Tracking with Delay Alerts — flow 23
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (17 nodes).

nodes.title: Purchase order fulfilled, tracking number received
Store tracking number and carrier in CRM
Fetch initial estimated delivery date from carrier API
Call carrier API for current status
Send delay alert SMS to customer

label: G006 · Resource-Aware Scheduling (Crews, Rooms, Equipment) — flow 24
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (14 nodes).

nodes.title: Extract resource requirements from estimate service type, size, complexity
Query resource availability calendar for matching skills
Create task for ops manager: find alternative resource
Select best match proximity, skill match, workload balance
Propose time slots to customer via SMS link
Book resource, confirm with calendar invite
Send reminder, auto-select best available after 48h
Send confirmation to customer with resource name, arrival window
Send notification to resource crew lead with job details

label: G006 · Multi-Phase Milestone Tracking and Notifications — flow 25
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (14 nodes).

nodes.title: Load project template with predefined phases and durations
Send start notification to crew and customer
Crew marks phase as complete in mobile app or SMS
All phases complete, move to job finished
Send delay alert to customer, create task for ops
Trigger final inspection and sign‑off workflow

label: G006 · Digital Sign-Off on Completion — flow 26
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (15 nodes).

nodes.title: Generate digital sign‑off request with completion summary
Send sign‑off link via SMS and email
Customer opens link, reviews completion details
Generate signed PDF, store in cloud
Update CRM: signed_off = true, signed_at timestamp
Notify ops: job ready for final close
Create task for project manager: address issues
Send acknowledgment to customer: we will fix issues

label: G006 · Warranty Registration and Document Delivery — flow 27
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (13 nodes).

nodes.title: Extract product information from estimate materials list
Call manufacturer API or submit web form
Generate customer warranty PDF with registration number
Upload warranty PDF to cloud storage
Send warranty document link to customer via SMS/email
Store warranty expiry date in CRM
Schedule renewal reminders at 11 months, 30 days, 7 days before expiry
Log warranty registration event to Airtable

label: G006 · Review Request with Reputation Monitoring — flow 28
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (11 nodes).

nodes.title: Wait 5 days for customer to experience result
Send review request via SMS and email with direct links
Send thank you message with referral link Pattern 24
Create high-priority task for ops manager

label: G006 · Referral Program with Unique Links and Reward Tracking — flow 2
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (15 nodes).

nodes.title: Trigger: positive review OR job completion + 14 days
Generate unique referral code and link for customer
Send referral offer SMS/email with link
Store referral code in CRM, track clicks
Friend clicks link, fills lead form
Calculate reward amount based on program rules
Send notification to referrer: reward earned
Trigger reward fulfillment gift card, discount, cash
Expire referral offer, tag as expired

label: G006 · The Human Handoff Taxonomy — flow 3
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (7 nodes).

label: G006 · Reactivation Sequence (Lost Leads / Dormant Customers) — flow 3
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (14 nodes).

nodes.title: Trigger: reactivation_date reached OR 365d since last job
Move contact from CLOSED_LOST or DORMANT to REACTIVATION stage
Move back to NEW_LEAD or QUALIFIED preserving estimate history
Send second reactivation message with stronger offer
Send final reactivation message with expiry
Archive to DORMANT_ARCHIVE, suppress future contact

label: G006 · Compliance Wrappers — flow 31
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (11 nodes).

nodes.title: Log all actions to immutable audit trail
If data stored, encrypt at rest

label: G006 · Capture Inbound Lead from Any Channel — flow 6
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (15 nodes).

nodes.title: Inbound event: form, call, chat, email, referral
Merge: update source, preserve oldest created_at
Apply source tag and UTM attribution
Create task for rep with SLA

label: G006 · Deduplicate and Merge Duplicate Records — flow 7
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (15 nodes).

nodes.title: Search existing contacts by phone and email
Compare confidence: exact phone? exact email?
Append new source tag to existing source list
If existing stage is earlier than qualified, keep qualified stage
Create task for ops: review potential duplicate

label: G006 · Round-Robin / Territory Assignment — flow 8
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (18 nodes).

nodes.title: Lead created in CRM, stage = NEW_LEAD
Assign to default queue for manual triage
Determine assignment rule: territory, round‑robin, or load‑balanced
Select next rep from global list (round‑robin
Check rep’s current open tasks count
Skip rep, go to next in round‑robin

label: G006 · AI Classification of Intent / BANT — flow 9
note: A flowchart from Automations 101 (20 nodes).

nodes.title: Call OpenAI API with classification prompt
Parse extracted fields: budget, timeline, authority, need, overall_intent
Score = budget + timeline + authority + need + source bonus
Update lead score, add intent:high tag
Send clarifying SMS for missing fields
Add intent:low tag, move to nurture sequence
